title: ctenanthe amphiandina
intro: Ctenanthe amphiandina, also known as the Prayer Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant is known for its attractive and unique foliage, with leaves that fold upwards at night, resembling a prayer. Research has shown that Ctenanthe amphiandina has medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever and inflammation, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to have health benefits including reducing stress and promoting relaxation.
